footer.tagline: Military-grade AES-256-GCM encryption in your browser. Zero servers. Zero databases. Zero trace.
promises: No data ever leaves your device
No accounts, no tracking, no analytics

vault.heroSubtitle: Your messages are locked with AES-256-GCM before they leave your device. No servers see your data. No passwords are stored.
vault.outputAreaSub: Locked or unlocked data will appear here.
vault.invisibleLSBDesc: Perfect cover — send as FILE only. Fails on WhatsApp photo compression.
vault.qrOverlayDesc: Visible QR on image. Survives WhatsApp/Telegram photo compression.
vault.decoyPlaceholder: Enter the DECOY message (this is shown if the decoy password is used)...
vault.decoyNote: NOTE: Provide this message and password to someone under pressure. Your MAIN secret remains safe.
vault.writeSecretDesc: Type your message, paste sensitive data, or drop a file. Phantom handles plain text, images, documents — anything you need to protect.
vault.setKeyDesc: Choose a strong, memorable password. This key never leaves your device — only you can unlock what you lock.
vault.shareSecurelyDesc: Copy the ciphertext, export a .phantom vault file, generate a QR code, or share via a one-time secure link.
vault.advancedImageDesc: Phantom features a powerful Dual Image Encryption Engine. When you upload an image to the Vault, you control exactly how it is secured.
vault.batchEncryptDesc: Select multiple files — they'll all be bundled into one encrypted .phantom archive.
vault.liveScannerDesc: Point your camera at a Phantom QR code to instantly load the encrypted payload.
vault.weaponizeDesc: Carrier image loaded successfully. What secret message or payload would you like to encrypt and hide inside its pixels?

notes.badge: In-Memory Only · Cleared on Tab Close
notes.title: Secure Notes
notes.subtitle: An encrypted, private notepad. Each note can be individually locked with its own password. Nothing is saved to disk.
notes.locked: This note is locked with AES-256-GCM.
notes.lockedSub: Enter the password below to reveal its contents.
notes.writePlaceholder: Start writing your secret note here...
notes.selectNote: Select or create a note to get started.

security.title: Architecture & Trust
security.subtitle: The mathematics, design decisions, and security guarantees that make Phantom trustworthy by construction — not by promise.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to absolute privacy.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.subtitle: A full record of everything that has been built, fixed, and improved in Phantom.

settings.title: Global Settings
settings.sessionNote: Settings are stored in-memory for this session.
